Finding: Implementation may expose a route without JWT even though OpenAPI has global security
Mitigation: Global auth middleware with /health allowlist and endpoint tests

Finding: BOLA: Member can call GET /books/{bookId}/loans for a book they do not own
Mitigation: Resource ownership checks and 403 tests for ID-shaped endpoints

Finding: Search parameters could be concatenated into SQL
Production connection strings may be stored in .env or source control
Mitigation: Azure Key Vault and managed identity plus secret scanning

Finding: HTTP or weak TLS could expose JWTs
POST /books and borrow endpoints may be spammed
Mitigation: Front Door WAF rate limits and app per-member limits

Finding: Address phone or JWT may leak through logs traces or Service Bus
Mitigation: Structured redacted logging and queue IDs only

Finding: Loan create/return may not include request ID and member ID
Invalid or oversized files may bypass validation
Mitigation: Validate type and size then store only in Blob Storage

Finding: Repeated invalid requests can increase cost and noise
Mitigation: WAF managed rules 429 and dashboard for blocked requests
